analysis: The project currently has a black hole theme with CSS animations and interactive elements. The theme includes cosmic visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. However, the current implementation lacks bulk animated objects and slides. The theme should be enhanced to include more animated objects and slides to better represent the black hole topic.

improvements.description: Add bulk animated objects and slides to the CSS file to enhance the black hole theme. Include animations for multiple black holes, swirling effects, and glowing elements to create a more immersive experience.

Add bulk animated objects and slides to the HTML file. Include multiple sections with interactive black holes, animated slides, and other elements related to black holes to provide a comprehensive and engaging user experience.

Implement bulk animated objects and slides in the JavaScript file. Add functionality to control the animations, transitions, and interactions of the black hole elements to ensure a smooth and dynamic user experience.
